nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in San Giovanni a Teduccio, eastern Naples. Founded in 1989 from a split of the Mazzarella clan.
Camorra clan from Ponticelli, allied with Rinaldi clan since 2019.
Camorra clan from Barra, allied with Rinaldi clan since 2019.
Camorra clan from which the Rinaldi clan split in 1989; rival of Rinaldi clan.
Powerful Camorra alliance allied with the Rinaldi clan.
Camorra clan listed as an ally of the Rinaldi clan in the infobox.
Camorra clan listed as an ally of the Rinaldi clan in the infobox.
Camorra group with which the Rinaldi clan made a pact to eliminate the Mazzarella clan.
Criminal group mentioned in relation to a drug business pact with the Rinaldi clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Since 2019 the clan has formed an alliance with the Ponticelli 's De Luca Bossa clan , and Barra 's Aprea-Cuccaro clan , called by the media Rinaldi-De Luca Bossa-Aprea
edges.context: The Rinaldi clan formed an alliance with the De Luca Bossa clan in 2019.

edges.evidence_quote: Since 2019 the clan has formed an alliance with the Ponticelli 's De Luca Bossa clan , and Barra 's Aprea-Cuccaro clan , called by the media Rinaldi-De Luca Bossa-Aprea
edges.context: The Rinaldi clan formed an alliance with the Aprea-Cuccaro clan in 2019.

edges.evidence_quote: The Rinaldi clan was founded in 1989 from the split of the Mazzarella clan .
edges.context: The Rinaldi clan split from the Mazzarella clan in 1989, indicating a structural tie.

edges.evidence_quote: Vincenzo was killed in 1996, after an escalation of violence between the Rinaldi and Mazzarella clans.
edges.context: There was an escalation of violence between the Rinaldi and Mazzarella clans in 1996.
The infobox lists the Mazzarella clan as a rival of the Rinaldi clan.

edges.evidence_quote: The clan is allied with the powerful Secondigliano Alliance , decisive in making the Rinaldi one of the most powerful clans in the Camorra.
edges.context: The Rinaldi clan is allied with the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Secondigliano Alliance , Contini clan , Giuliano clan , De Luca Bossa clan , Aprea-Cuccaro clan
edges.context: The infobox lists the Secondigliano Alliance as an ally of the Rinaldi clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Secondigliano Alliance , Contini clan , Giuliano clan , De Luca Bossa clan , Aprea-Cuccaro clan
edges.context: The infobox lists the Contini clan as an ally of the Rinaldi clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Secondigliano Alliance , Contini clan , Giuliano clan , De Luca Bossa clan , Aprea-Cuccaro clan
edges.context: The infobox lists the Giuliano clan as an ally of the Rinaldi clan.

edges.evidence_quote: the Rinaldi clan made a pact with the leaders of the so-called Paranza dei bambini, even before it was headed by the Giuliano's heirs, the main objective of the pact was to eliminate the Mazzarella clan
edges.context: The Rinaldi clan made a pact with the Paranza dei bambini to eliminate the Mazzarella clan.

edges.evidence_quote: De Bernardo was killed for violating the pact on the drugs business with the leaders of the Piezzo group, but above all, with the boss Ciro Rinaldi.
edges.context: The Rinaldi clan had a pact on the drugs business with the Piezzo group.
